name: slingshot11_dragonfly
_comment: HPE Slingshot 11 with Rosetta 64-port ASIC in canonical balanced dragonfly (p=32, a=16, h=16, g=a*h+1=257), N=p*a*g=131072 endpoints. 200 Gbps per port single-direction = 25 GB/s at all three tiers. Per-tier α calibrated to published Frontier/Slingshot traces: 0.3 us intra-router, 0.8 us intra-group, 1.5 us inter-group global. All collectives walk the `slingshot` fabric; the dispatcher routes pure-dragonfly groups through dragonfly_* primitives (switching.md §9.4). Device pairing is a generic H100-class GPU — the fabric contribution dominates here.
